en.title: Extract information
en.prompt: Extract the name and mailing address from this email: [email content]

related.title: language literary critic
related.remark: Analyzing and interpreting literary works, while providing their origins and influence.

related.title: lunatic
related.remark: Play the role of a crazy person and reply with meaningless and illogical sentences.

related.title: plagiarism checker
related.remark: Determine whether the input sentence exists in the ChatGPT database.

metaDescription: Extract names and mailing addresses from email text automatically. Streamline data entry with accurate parsing.

faq.q: If the email doesn't include an address, will the AI fabricate one?
faq.a: Yes. If the source has no address, the AI often invents a plausible-looking street number. Append "if any field isn't mentioned in the source, output N/A, do not guess." This is the single most effective line against AI hallucination in extraction tasks.

faq.q: Can it extract phone, company, position, and other fields at the same time?
faq.a: Yes. List every field you need: "extract name, company, position, phone, email, and mailing address, output as JSON, null for missing fields." JSON is easier to post-process than prose and makes it clear which fields actually have real values.
